evidence_binding: Stage6J exports use the BTS-wrapped Node ZIP profile and must pass delivery guard, CRC proof, fresh extraction, and boot verification before being labeled bootable OS authority.
purpose: Prevent support/proof bundles from being confused with bootable full OS authority downloads in chat responses.

required_labels.sha256_sidecar: SHA-256 SIDECAR FOR BOOTABLE FULL OS AUTHORITY ZIP
required_labels.support_bundle: SUPPORT/PROOF BUNDLE - NOT THE OS BUNDLE

rule: Any user-facing download link for a bootable full MetaBlooms OS authority ZIP must be labeled exactly or equivalently as BOOTABLE FULL OS AUTHORITY ZIP. Support, proof, receipt, overlay, fixture, or audit bundles must be labeled SUPPORT/PROOF BUNDLE or equivalent and must not be presented as the OS bundle.
